text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O's first three years are a<n>resounding
success and a fitting<n>origin story for the Centurial
Overlord.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As she makes her morning entrance,<n>the curtains
open.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! I'm indestructible! My<n>supreme rule
begins now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, again, I am victorious... My<n>castle's
treasury is already filled to<n>the brim with G1
trophies.

Hnngh... Second again... I'd like to win<n>at least
once.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As per usual, T.M. Opera O takes first<n>place with
Meisho Doto in second!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
No one can break their one-two finish.<n>No one!
They've established a true<n>dynasty!

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's over... It's all over... No one else<n>will ever take
the G1 crown again.

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
It's the dark ages... We're doomed, I<n>tell you!
DOOMED!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's not like we're about to die here,<n>come on...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smiles have disappeared from the<n>many faces
within Tracen Academy...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Centurial Overlord's looming<n>presence is now
a dark cloud. It<n>crushes their dreams, one after
another.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, heh heh heh... Hehehehehe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! How beautiful! Is it<n>not the most
splendid sight you've<n>ever beheld?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Complete domination, like I had<n>always dreamed
of!
choice_data_list: Don't you think... this is a bit much?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I, um... might agree. Everyone seems<n>a little
shaken.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, nonsense. You simply do not<n>see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Look there! Behold the scene!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The dark clouds suddenly part and a<n>beam of light
illuminates the training<n>center.

text_block_list.name: Fiery Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O... As soon as I debut, I<n>swear I'm
gonna take you down!

Heh, yeah right. Good luck coming up<n>with a
strategy when there are no<n>openings.

text_block_list.name: Cool Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: We'll both get our butts handed to us.

Well... How 'bout training with me? If<n>we put our
heads together, we can<n>come up with something
to end her<n>reign!

text_block_list.name: Cool Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be caught dead teaming up<n>with you...
But I guess I've got no<n>choice. You're on!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Shadows exist when there is light.<n>Hope is born
from despair. And...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So long as the Centurial Overlord<n>remains, others
will join forces to<n>topple her reign!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Beneath a kingdom of terror, new<n>buds take hold
within the earth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An iron fist ensures that they will<n>grow stronger
still.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My dream has been realized. Under<n>the Centurial
Overlord's absolute rule,<n>brave souls rise to
challenge it!

That endless cycle of strife shall drive<n>my eternal
kingdom to completion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It is domination under the name<n>of inspiration.
Haaah hah hah hah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After all this time, T.M. Opera O's true<n>plan is
coming to light.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But something about it feels a little<n>improvised on
the spot... I'll refrain<n>from asking.

Wh-whoa! Perfect as always, Opera<n>O. Then, what
happens when the<n>ultimate hero is born?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent question. The chosen hero<n>will one day
arrive at my castle gate,<n>and the final battle will
commence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall defeat said hero by the<n>slimmest of
margins, thus shattering<n>their heart and soul to
shards!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! It is back to square one,<n>hero! Off to
fringe theatre with you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Unlike a demon lord, she doesn't<n>consider losing
to be a possibility.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O narrows her eyes and<n>looks down
from the rooftop onto the<n>world below.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ahh! This beauty... My kingdom<n>absolute.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The verdant fields through which I<n>run. the
pleasant shade cast by the<n>towering zelkova
trees... Nature's<n>beauty is marvelous.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and all those who serve me<n>standing at
my side... The bonds we<n>hold are beautiful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And those who stand against me?<n>Beautiful are
the flowers which bloom<n>in the face of adversity.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Above all, I am overwhelming,<n>absolute, and
infinite...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I, the Centurial Overlord, do truly<n>shine! T.M. Opera
O—the epitome of<n>beauty!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: HAAAH HA HA HA!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's everyone's ruler, aspiration,<n>and greatest
fear. T.M. Opera O reigns<n>over all.

The tale of this momentous time will<n>surely be
passed down through<n>generations of Umamusume
as the<n>greatest drama ever written.
